user_query:
I just wrapped up our April 15 planning meeting and need to produce clean follow-ups for our Gwandum tourism campaign. Please work entirely from the local files and directory structure provided. Do not use the internet or add external facts.

Inputs to inspect and use:
- Directory: input/meetings/2026-04-15/
  - agenda.md
  - attendees.csv
  - notes.txt
- File: input/resources/gwandum_assets.csv

Deliverables:
1) Meeting summary (output/2026-04-15_gwandum_promo_meeting_summary.md)
   Include the following sections:
   - Meeting Details: title and date.
   - Attendees: list each Name and Role from attendees.csv.
   - Agenda Coverage: for each agenda item from agenda.md, indicate Addressed or Unaddressed based on notes.txt.
   - Decisions: extract every line starting with "DECISION:" from notes.txt.
   - Action Items: extract every line starting with "ACTION:" from notes.txt and list each with: Task summary, Owner name, Due date (YYYY-MM-DD), and Owner status "Internal" if the Owner exactly matches a Name in attendees.csv, otherwise "External". Also include a one-line count summary like: Internal N / External M.
   - Attractions mentioned: list attractions that appear in notes.txt whose names exactly match entries in input/resources/gwandum_assets.csv; include each item’s priority from the CSV. If none are mentioned, state "None mentioned".
   - Next meeting: the date if present in notes, or "TBD" if not found.
   - Sources: list the exact input files used with relative paths and also report the number of files found under input/meetings/2026-04-15/.

2) Draft email to attendees (output/draft_emails/attendees_followup_email.txt)
   Requirements:
   - Include a "To:" line listing the comma-separated email addresses from attendees.csv.
   - Provide a concise subject line that references the meeting date.
   - In the body, briefly summarize the Decisions section and include the Action Items grouped by Owner with due dates. Mention the next meeting date if present.

3) Draft outreach email to hotels (output/draft_emails/hotel_outreach_email.txt)
   Requirements:
   - Provide a subject line proposing partnership for the "Gwandum Weekend Discovery" package.
   - In the body, include a short pitch that references at least two attractions mentioned in notes.txt that exist in input/resources/gwandum_assets.csv; if fewer than two are mentioned, use the top two by lowest priority number from gwandum_assets.csv instead.
   - Include a clear call to action asking for package rate proposals by the due date associated with the partnership outreach action item in notes.txt.

Notes and constraints:
- Treat the folder name (2026-04-15) as the meeting date when needed.
- Parse lines beginning with "DECISION:" and "ACTION:" exactly from notes.txt.
- Owner matching for Internal/External must rely on exact Name matches in attendees.csv.
- Use only the provided files; do not fabricate additional attendees, attractions, or decisions.
- Ensure all three deliverables are created at the specified output paths. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
